components.name: VM Lifecycle Operations
components.reason: Start/stop/restart operations supported via VirtualMachine spec

components.name: NSX Security Groups
components.reason: Security Groups cannot be automatically translated - no direct OpenShift equivalent
recommendations: Security groups have no direct OpenShift equivalent
Option 1: Model as pod selectors in NetworkPolicy
Option 2: Use labels to group pods logically
Option 3: Keep NSX for security groups (hybrid)
Requires specialist review of security requirements

components.name: NSX Distributed Firewall
components.reason: Firewall Rules can be partially translated to NetworkPolicy with manual configuration
recommendations: Convert firewall rules to NetworkPolicy manifests
Note: NetworkPolicy is L3/L4 only (no L7 filtering)
Consider using Calico for advanced features
Test egress/ingress rules in dev environment

components.name: NSX Overlay Segments
components.reason: Segments can be partially translated to NetworkAttachmentDefinition (Multus CNI) with manual configuration
recommendations: Update pod specs to reference NAD
Map VLAN/overlay IDs to bridge/macvlan config
